rationale: Lens = ADR-0037 amendment accuracy. Cross-checked the 2026-07-11 spec-115 block (ADR §1 lines 151-194) against the shipped gate (runOrphanObligationGate + ApproveImpl ordering, internal/approve/impl.go). REACH is accurate and not overclaimed: 'every lifecycle verb that can merge a bead branch' — impl approve is the sole remaining merging verb (spec Goal), and its finalize path auto-merges unmerged bead/<id> branches. REFUSAL scope matches code exactly: runOrphanObligationGate runs (impl.go:369) BEFORE the phase-reconcile write (385), epic close (402), done write (410), and FinalizeEpic (443) — a refusal returns before any of those, so 'no epic close/phase write/merge/push' is true. SETTLEMENT SURFACE claim holds: the gate computes no Allow/Block (returns error/nil), writes no panel metadata, and uses complete.CheckPendingObligations which is check-only ('never re-implements'); the advisory slot line only reads panel.Tally, writes nothing. Coverage is honestly scoped to closed-without-complete (Leg 1/2) and unsettled refutation_pending (Leg 3), and the two residuals (raw-git-merged-no-obligation, raw bd close) are disclosed per §8 — matching Non-Goals, no overclaim. HATCHES: gate never consults MINDSPEC_SKIP_PANEL/config toggle (docstring + code); amendment's 'except the gate, not the obligation / not this refusal' is exact. ADR-0030 layering honored (refusal in approve, not executor). CHAIN: block at line 151 appended immediately after the 2026-07-10 spec-114 refutations block (135), dated 2026-07-11, contract-level with NO BranchExists/worktree/ancestry internals leaked. §§2-5/§8 correctly stated unchanged; §6 unchanged for pristine beads matches Req 5. No overclaim, wrong-surface, hatch, chain, or format defect found.

findings.detail: Amendment states the contract now covers every lifecycle verb that can merge a bead branch, naming impl approve as the one verb past the 2026-06-17 complete enforcement point. Consistent with spec Goal (impl approve is the last un-gated merging verb) and with FinalizeEpic's auto-merge loop. Not enforcement-home relocation — correctly framed as reach, not a second gate.

runOrphanObligationGate is invoked at impl.go:369, strictly before the Spec 092 deferred phase-reconcile write, MUTATION(1/3) epic close, the done write, CommitCount preflight, and FinalizeEpic. Returning guard.NewFailure short-circuits all of them. Amendment's 'exit non-zero: no epic close, no phase write, no merge, no push' is exact.

Gate computes no PanelGateDecision, writes no panel audit metadata, and applies no refutation: Leg 3 uses complete.CheckPendingObligations (check-only seam, per impl.go:80-83); implAdvisorySlotLine reads panel.Tally read-only and explicitly writes nothing (impl.go:704-730). 'single settlement surface remains mindspec complete' verified.

Gate never consults MINDSPEC_SKIP_PANEL or enforcement.panel_gate (docstring impl.go:578-581). Amendment's 'hatches except the gate, not the obligation, and never this refusal' matches — hatch bypass is scoped to the gate decision inside the recovery complete run, not this lifecycle-bypass guard.

findings.claim: Chain position, date, and altitude correct
findings.detail: spec-115 block at line 151 is appended directly after the 2026-07-10 spec-114 refutations block (line 135) in §1; dated 2026-07-11; contract-level with no BranchExists/worktree-enumeration/ancestry internals. Residuals and §§2-5/§6/§8 unchanged-claims all accurate.
